name: PM-KISAN (Pradhan Mantri Kisan Samman Nidhi)
description: Provides income support of ₹6,000 per year, paid in three equal installments, to landholding farmer families across the country.

name: Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana (PMAY)
description: Offers financial assistance and interest subsidy on home loans to help eligible families build or buy their own homes.

name: National Scholarship Portal - Means-cum-Merit Scholarship
description: Financial assistance for students from SC, ST, and BC backgrounds with low family income to continue their education.

name: Pradhan Mantri Mudra Yojana (PMMY)
description: Provides collateral-free loans of up to ₹10 lakh to small business owners and aspiring entrepreneurs to start or grow a business.

name: ADIP Scheme (Assistance to Disabled Persons)
description: Provides free or subsidised modern, durable assistive devices (wheelchairs, hearing aids, prosthetics, etc.) to persons with disabilities.
